locked_fields.name: Mihir Patel
project_titles: Serverless Web Archiving Solution on AWS
Recipe Suggestion AI Solution on AWS

job_description.company_context: IBM Consulting is a global technology consulting firm that helps enterprise clients navigate hybrid cloud and AI transformations using IBM technology and Red Hat. The team builds data engineering and analytics solutions for clients across industries on Azure-based cloud infrastructure.
core_pain_points: Client data pipelines ingest from multiple heterogeneous sources (Snowflake, ProsOD3) with inconsistent formats — need an engineer who can own end-to-end ingestion, transformation, validation, and delta-format storage without hand-holding.
Data Science team is blocked on model input preparation — need someone who can bridge the gap between raw data and model-ready datasets, freeing data scientists to focus on modeling.
Recurring production incidents with no clear root-cause ownership — need an engineer who can investigate, resolve, and document bugs and change requests systematically.
Business stakeholders lack timely self-service reporting — need someone who can build and maintain PowerBI dashboards that directly answer business questions from sprint requirements.

DevOps/CI-CD practices are immature on the team — need an engineer who can work alongside DevOps engineers on Azure DevOps pipelines and code repositories while learning infrastructure best practices.
latent_requirements: Azure Databricks + PySpark proficiency implied by Spark and Delta Lake mentions — expect notebook-based development, cluster config, and Spark job optimization.
Azure Data Factory pipeline orchestration implied by Azure Data Factory mention — expect linked services, triggers, data flows, and ARM template awareness.
Git and branching strategies implied by CI/CD + code repositories — expect pull requests, feature branching, and merge conflict resolution.
Data warehouse concepts (staging, partitioning, schema design) implied by Snowflake + Delta Lake + SQL Server combination.
Agile tooling (JIRA or Azure Boards) implied by Sprint planning and Agile methodology mentions — expect backlog grooming and sprint ceremonies.

creative_buffer_used.description: All iter2 additions plus: 'PySpark' in Aptologics bullet 1; 'Snowflake-compatible' in dbt Cloud bullet; 'cleansing,' added to Aptologics bullet 3; 'Profiled and re-optimized' + '2+ client analytics workstreams' in Aptologics bullet 7; 'managing code repositories and infrastructure' in TCS bullet 6; 'Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment' spelled out in Project Stream bullet 2; 'hybrid cloud analytics delivery' + 'business intelligence requirements' in Summary

requirement_map.jd_requirement: Data ingestion from diverse sources (Snowflake, ProsOD3), cleansing, transforming, curating, validating, partitioning, storing in delta formats
requirement_map.master_match: Built and maintained Databricks ETL/ELT pipelines supporting daily ingestion and transformation (Aptologics bullet 1) + Integrated data from 4+ source systems including Salesforce Cloud (Aptologics bullet 4)
requirement_map.draft_strategy: Reframe Aptologics bullet 1 to name 'delta-format storage' explicitly; add 'curating and validating' language to the multi-source integration bullet

requirement_map.jd_requirement: Support Data Scientists by providing model input in the required format
requirement_map.master_match: Built feature-oriented aggregate tables that reduced ad-hoc preprocessing time for exploratory ML workflows by 25-30% (Aptologics bullet 6) + Supported time-series forecasting experiments on large historical datasets (NSH bullet 3)
requirement_map.draft_strategy: Reframe Aptologics bullet to emphasize 'model input preparation' language; reframe NSH bullet to name 'structured model inputs'

requirement_map.jd_requirement: Root cause analysis of production issues, bug resolution, automation, change assessment
requirement_map.master_match: Investigated multi-stage production pipelines and resolved recurring debugging issues (NSH bullet 7) + Maintained and debugged 15-year legacy codebase, resolving 50+ production issues (TCS bullet 3) + Improved incident turnaround with structured issue documentation and runbooks (TCS bullet 7)
requirement_map.draft_strategy: Promote the NSH root-cause bullet to early position; keep TCS production-debugging and runbook bullets

requirement_map.jd_requirement: PowerBI reports based on business requirements, stakeholder collaboration
requirement_map.master_match: Partnered with analysts and business stakeholders to translate 10+ KPI definitions into Tableau/Power BI dashboards (Aptologics bullet 5)
requirement_map.draft_strategy: Reframe to add 'sprint requirements' language, mirror JD vocabulary around business-driven reporting

requirement_map.jd_requirement: CI/CD deployments, code repositories, DevOps best practices
requirement_map.master_match: Automated CI/CD pipelines with Docker and GitHub Actions (Project Stream bullet 6)
requirement_map.draft_strategy: Add Azure DevOps to Skills CI/CD section as creative buffer; highlight CI/CD bullet in TCS and Project Stream

requirement_map.jd_requirement: Agile Sprint planning, gathering requirements, project scope
requirement_map.master_match: Executed Agile delivery with 16+ sprint ceremonies, served as Scrum Master (Project Stream) + Participated in weekly and monthly delivery cadences (NSH bullet 8)
requirement_map.draft_strategy: Keep both; reframe NSH cadence bullet to use 'Agile' language explicitly

requirement_map.master_match: Databricks ETL/ELT pipelines across all of Aptologics tenure; Databricks-based workflows at NSH
requirement_map.draft_strategy: Add 'Azure' prefix to Databricks in Skills; add Spark to Data Engineering skills category as creative buffer
Add Azure Data Factory to Cloud/Infrastructure Skills section as creative buffer (2 words)

requirement_map.jd_requirement: Data warehouse concepts — staging, partitioning, schema design (latent)
requirement_map.master_match: Designed modular dbt Cloud models; data-quality checks including schema consistency; Databricks transformation logic optimization
requirement_map.draft_strategy: dbt Cloud + Databricks + Delta Lake in Skills captures this; existing bullets already cover schema consistency and modular transformation design

requirement_map.master_match: Automated CI/CD pipelines with Docker and GitHub Actions (Project Stream)
requirement_map.draft_strategy: GitHub Actions bullet implicitly demonstrates Git fluency; no need to add separate entry

data cleansing, predictive models, code repositories, business intelligence, hybrid cloud absent — ~71% coverable keyword coverage vs 85% threshold
